__fixture__.name: collaboration_archive_blocked_by_hold
__fixture__.scenario: Admin-initiated delete of a managed collaboration-archive copy where the job acknowledged and scheduled, then entered blocked_by_hold under an administrative legal hold cited from the governed-record state model and an explicit policy reference. Expected next state change is pinned to the hold review cadence.
contract_sections: Blocked_by_hold MUST carry at least one hold-class blocker with an artifact_ref or policy_ref.
Blocked states MUST keep expected_next_state_change_at non-null.
Remaining-location notes name the managed archive store and the destruction-receipt ledger separately.

remaining_location_notes.note: Managed archive copy remains retained under the collaboration archive contract term while the hold applies.
A destruction-receipt entry will be emitted when the hold clears and the managed copy is destroyed.

blockers.note: Administrative legal hold applies until the hold review cadence clears or extends it.
